coreTruthSet.description: First matriarch’s rapid intuitive correctness is misread as luck or temporary coincidence due to peer’s learned-mastery model.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: She misreads this as luck, coincidence, or temporary correctness.

coreTruthSet.description: Secondary POV frame is comparative: measuring speed, precision, efficiency, and motion smoothness against one’s own benchmark.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: She is measuring: performance against performance.

coreTruthSet.description: Affective state is competitive unsettledness: not overt jealousy, but awareness that expected hierarchy may be shifting.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Not jealousy yet ... awareness of disruption in expected hierarchy.

settingAnchors.name: Shared Household Work Circle
settingAnchors.description: Household workflow space where peer comparison, correctness norms, and earned-standing evaluation are continuously enacted.

continuityConstraints.title: Learned vs Intuitive Mastery Tension
continuityConstraints.text: Conflict pressure emerges when repetition-earned competence confronts immediate intuitive alignment that bypasses expected learning arcs.

continuityConstraints.title: Earned Standing Gatekeeping
continuityConstraints.text: Equal standing is granted through perceived correctness legitimacy, not solely elder endorsement.

continuityConstraints.title: Quiet Peer Evaluation Loop
continuityConstraints.text: Peer evaluation runs silently through micro-comparisons of movement quality, correction frequency, and workflow interference.

openResearchGaps.title: How is expected hierarchy disruption managed to avoid overt peer fracture while standards remain intact?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to maintain social coherence in performance-competitive scenes.

openResearchGaps.title: What threshold of repeated correct execution converts perceived luck into recognized mastery?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed for believable progression from skepticism to acknowledgment.

openResearchGaps.title: Which concrete micro-signals indicate peer acceptance versus provisional tolerance in the work circle?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to track status shifts without explicit dialogue declaration.
